name: Some jurists have interpreted this verse to signify that if the spouses break their vow
introduction:
and re-establish sexual relations they will not be liable to any expiation and will be
pardoned by God gratuitously. However, the majority of jurists are of the opinion that they,
are required to expiate. The statement that God is Oft-Forgiving and Merciful does not mean
that God has forgiven them. It means rather that God will accept their expiation and will
forgive them for whatever excesses they may have committed against each other.
